name: iteration02-companion-tasks-boss
description: Verify DNA graphics, compact companions, original avatar with a closed fist item, pet inventory layout, task readiness feedback, hit estimates, Titan countdown, and weak-point feedback.

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG
local decor=root.Polish["City Decor"]
local dna=decor["DNA Lab Compact Sign"]
local boss=root.Walls["Titan Server Wall"]
local parts,images,decals=0,0,0
for _,d in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("BasePart") then parts+=1 end end
for _,d in ipairs(dna:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Image=="rbxassetid://80764015986038" then images+=1 elseif d:IsA("Decal") and d.Texture=="rbxassetid://80764015986038" then decals+=1 end end
return H:JSONEncode({parts=parts,images=images,decals=decals,nextAttack=boss:GetAttribute("NextAttackAt"),hasNextAttribute=boss:GetAttribute("NextAttackAt")~=nil})

steps.label: DNA graphic and boss countdown contract exist

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation
c:Invoke("Reset")
c:Invoke("SetStats",{Coins=10000,Power=60,WallLevel=25,FistMastery=10,DailyBreaks=0,DailyQuestClaimed=0,PlaytimeSeconds=5,PlaytimeClaimed=0})
local hatch=c:Invoke("HatchPet")
if hatch.pet then c:Invoke("EquipPet",hatch.pet) end
local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1]
p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(-2,7,-13)
c:Invoke("HitWall","Brick Wall")
return H:JSONEncode({pet=hatch.pet,ok=hatch.ok})

steps.label: prepare one equipped companion and wall target

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer
local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD
g:SetAttribute("AutomationTab","Pets")
task.wait(.45)
local c=g.GameMenu.Content
local banner=c:FindFirstChild("Hero City Generated Banner")
local folder=workspace:FindFirstChild(p.Name.." Client Companions")
local model=folder and folder:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Model")
local maxSize,eyes,feet,tails=0,0,0,0
if model then for _,d in ipairs(model:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("BasePart") then maxSize=math.max(maxSize,d.Size.X,d.Size.Y,d.Size.Z) end if d.Name=="Eye" then eyes+=1 elseif d.Name=="Foot" then feet+=1 elseif d.Name=="Tail" then tails+=1 end end end
local row,thumb
for _,d in ipairs(c:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("Frame") and string.match(d.Name,"^#%d+") then row=d thumb=d:FindFirstChild("Pet Rarity Thumbnail") break end end
local actions=row and row:FindFirstChild("Actions")
local buttons,layoutOK=0,true
if actions then for _,b in ipairs(actions:GetChildren()) do if b:IsA("TextButton") then buttons+=1 layoutOK=layoutOK and b.AbsoluteSize.Y>=44 and b.AbsolutePosition.X>=actions.AbsolutePosition.X-1 and b.AbsolutePosition.X+b.AbsoluteSize.X<=actions.AbsolutePosition.X+actions.AbsoluteSize.X+1 end end end
local char=p.Character
local gauntlet=char and char:FindFirstChild("Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet")
local mutation,tailSegments,knuckles,wedges=0,0,0,0
if gauntlet then for _,d in ipairs(gauntlet:GetDescendants()) do if string.find(d.Name,"Starter Mutation",1,true) then mutation+=1 elseif string.find(d.Name,"Kaiju Tail Segment",1,true) then tailSegments+=1 elseif string.find(d.Name,"Closed Knuckle",1,true) then knuckles+=1 elseif d:IsA("WedgePart") then wedges+=1 end end end
local distance=(model and model.PrimaryPart and char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")) and (model.PrimaryPart.Position-char.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude or 0
return H:JSONEncode({banner=banner and banner.Image or "",companion=model~=nil,sizeOK=maxSize<=1.91,eyes=eyes,feet=feet,tails=tails,distanceOK=distance>=2 and distance<=6,thumb=thumb and thumb.Image or "",buttons=buttons,layoutOK=layoutOK,mutation=mutation,tailSegments=tailSegments,knuckles=knuckles,wedges=wedges,closed=gauntlet and gauntlet:GetAttribute("ClosedFist"),cuff=gauntlet and gauntlet:FindFirstChild("Gauntlet Tapered Cuff")~=nil})

steps.label: companion, pet menu, and closed fist preserve the avatar

args.code:
local ordered={}
local menu=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD.GameMenu
local tabBar=menu:FindFirstChild("Tabs")
assert(tabBar,"Tabs missing")
for _,d in ipairs(tabBar:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("TextButton") then table.insert(ordered,{x=d.AbsolutePosition.X,name=d.Name}) end end
table.sort(ordered,function(a,b) return a.x<b.x end)
local names={} for _,item in ipairs(ordered) do table.insert(names,item.name) end
return table.concat(names,"|")

steps.label: menu tabs keep intentional left-to-right order

args.code:
local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation
c:Invoke("Reset")
c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=25,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0,FistMastery=1})
local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1]
p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(-2,7,-13)
c:Invoke("HitWall","Brick Wall")
return true

local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD
g.GameMenu.Visible=false
task.wait(.6)
local hud=g.TargetWallHUD
return H:JSONEncode({visible=hud.Visible,detail=hud.TargetDetail.Text,hasHits=string.find(string.lower(hud.TargetDetail.Text),"hits",1,true)~=nil})

steps.label: wall HUD estimates current hits remaining

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD
g:SetAttribute("AutomationTab","Tasks")
task.wait(.35)
local c=g.GameMenu.Content
local q=c["City Cleanup"]:FindFirstChild("ClaimQuest",true)
local p=c["Five Minute Supply"]:FindFirstChild("ClaimPlaytime",true)
return H:JSONEncode({quest=q.Text,questActive=q.Active,questHeight=q.AbsoluteSize.Y,play=p.Text,playActive=p.Active,playHeight=p.AbsoluteSize.Y})

steps.label: failed claim gives explicit local feedback

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation
c:Invoke("Reset")
c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=1000000,WallLevel=25,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0,FistMastery=1})
local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1]
p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(82,7,15)
local hit=c:Invoke("HitBoss")
return H:JSONEncode({ok=hit.ok,broken=hit.TitanBroken,hp=hit.TitanHP})

steps.label: enter Titan phase two without breaking boss
wait for countdown scheduling and boss HUD

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local b=workspace.PunchWallRPG.Walls["Titan Server Wall"]
local nextAt=b:GetAttribute("NextAttackAt") or 0
return H:JSONEncode({phase=b:GetAttribute("BossPhase"),scheduled=nextAt>workspace:GetServerTimeNow(),remaining=math.ceil(nextAt-workspace:GetServerTimeNow())})

steps.label: Titan shockwave has a replicated countdown

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD
g.GameMenu.Visible=false
task.wait(.3)
return H:JSONEncode({visible=g.BossHUD.Visible,title=g.BossHUD.BossTitle.Text,subtitle=g.BossHUD.BossSubtitle.Text,weak=string.find(g.BossHUD.BossTitle.Text,"x1.5",1,true)~=nil,countdown=string.find(g.BossHUD.BossSubtitle.Text,"SHOCKWAVE",1,true)~=nil})

steps.label: boss HUD explains weak point and incoming shockwave

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation
c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=100})
local r=c:Invoke("HitBossWeakPoint")
return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,damage=r.damage or 0})

steps.label: weak-point strike gives distinct local feedback
